gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors reminded attendees to maintain eye contact, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, students clutch resumes inside branded folders, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; furthermore, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, alongside tech companies displaying demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, as students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; additionally, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; furthermore, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Tech companies display demo screens showcasing their latest applications, event staff are scanning registrations and handing out lanyards at the entrance, students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, students are clutching resumes inside branded folders, and alumni volunteers are sharing quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
